description: Fragment filled with Arabic script and Judaeo-Arabic and Hebrew written at all angles. The main blocks of Arabic script consist of lists, at least one of which might be a table of contents of a book. The main block of Judaeo-Arabic is a portion of a letter (PGP ID 26783). Needs further examination.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
